CustomField.description: The number of scheduled retry attempts for this web service call. Pre-incremented when a retry is scheduled (not when it executes), so a retry that has been scheduled but not yet run is reflected in the count. Maximum retries configured in the API Setting record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Counts scheduled retries (incremented when a retry is scheduled, not when it runs). Maximum is configured in the API Setting record.
CustomField.label: Retries
